option.name: originalContent
option.value:
L&F
LOST&FOUND
Home Lost Items Found Items Post Item Dashboard
Login Sign Up
Dashboard
Home Lost Items Found Items Post Item Dashboard Login / Sign Up
Community-Driven Platform

Lost & Found
Web Application

A community-driven platform that reunites people with their lost belongings. Post, search, and connect — anonymously and securely.

Report Found Item Search Lost Items
—
Lost Items
—
Found Items
—
Reunited
The Problem

Lost items rarely
find their way home

Every day, thousands of people lose personal items — wallets, phones, keys, pets — with no effective centralized way to report or find them. Traditional methods are fragmented, inefficient, and frustrating.

✕

No central platform to post or search lost items

✕

Privacy concerns about sharing contact information publicly

✕

Outdated listings that clog searches and waste time

Our Solution

A smart, secure &
community platform

Lost & Found brings the community together with real-time posts, intelligent search, anonymous contact, and automatic status management — making reunions happen faster.

✓

Centralized real-time database powered by Firebase

✓

Anonymous contact system protects your privacy

✓

Automatic status tracking and expiry management

Features

Everything you need

Built with the community in mind, every feature is designed to maximize reunions.

Found Item Posts

Report items you've found with photos, location, and details so the rightful owner can reclaim them.

Lost Item Tickets

Post detailed descriptions of what you've lost. Our community will help identify and return your belongings.

Search & Filter

Powerful search with category, location, status filters and real-time results to find items instantly.

✋

Claim Requests

Found your item? Submit a claim and get connected with the finder securely and efficiently.

️

Anonymous Contact

Connect without exposing personal details. Our privacy-first approach keeps your information safe.

⏱️

Auto Expiry

Posts automatically track status updates from Open → Claimed → Reunited, keeping listings accurate.

Recent Lost Items

Help reunite these items with their owners

View All →
View All Lost Items →

Ready to help your community?

Join thousands of users who are helping each other recover lost belongings every day.

Get Started Free Browse Found Items
L&F
LOST&FOUND
Lost Items Found Items Post Item Login

© 2025 Lost & Found Platform. All rights reserved.
